docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CUELLAL, GLENDY AS TO DEFENDANT LUARCA, EDDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND/OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-07-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND PLAINTIFF MUST BRING HER OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS WILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE, IF THE CASE WAS GOING TO BE HEARD TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
